subject: fix(structure): remap cell indices on insert/remove, fix review findings
body:
Critical fixes:
- getElementsForCell now filters by visible+content, preventing empty
  z-index:2 wrapper divs that could intercept clicks
- insertSection, removeSection, addSubdivision, removeSubdivision now
  shift all cell-indexed data (text, images, overlays, padding, frames)
  so content stays with the correct visual cell

Medium fixes:
- Migration now replicates old auto-assignment for null textCells entries
  (title/tagline/cta→image cell, body/footnote→non-image cell) instead
  of dumping everything into cell 0
- Shared defaultTextLayer with all fields (bold, italic, letterSpacing)
  used by both AdCanvas and ContentTab, preventing field drift
- cellsWithContent now checks visible flag, not just content existence

Low fixes:
- PDF pixel ratio dynamically capped at ~16M pixels to prevent crashes
  on large formats (YouTube Banner at 3x = 7680x4320 = 500MB canvas)
- Alignment icons and options extracted to shared config/alignment.jsx

Tags: structure, state, export, text, alignment
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: per-cell-text
Semver: patch

title: remap cell indices on insert/remove, fix review findings
